title: verifier panel artefact
description: Synthesised result written by spawn-verifier-panel.sh after aggregating N=3 panellist verifiers via majority vote. Extends the base verifier artefact schema with panellist detail and quorum metadata.

stage_id.description: Stage id matching the stage card basename.

verifier_invocation.description: Command used to invoke the panel.

ran_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of synthesis completion.

criteria.description: Per-criterion verdicts sourced from the first available panellist artefact. May be empty if no panellist returned an artefact.

additional_findings.description: Panel synthesis notes. Prefixed with [Panel synthesis — majority <OVERALL>].

overall.description: Majority vote result. PASS when pass_count >= fail_count and quorum met.

panellists.description: One entry per panellist in fixed order: 0=Opus (SDK), 1=Sonnet (SDK), 2=Codex (CLI).

identity.description: Agent identity string for this panellist.

artefact_path.description: Path to the panellist's individual artefact file, or null if the panellist crashed.

overall.description: Panellist verdict, or null if the panellist crashed (counts as no-vote).

quorum.description: Quorum tracking. required=2 for N=3. If achieved < required the stage stalls with verifier_panel_no_quorum.

required.description: Minimum votes needed to produce a valid synthesis.

achieved.description: Number of panellists that returned a valid artefact.
